PROP-01b-partial-inv-009.text: _call must bubble up revert reason from failed external call or emit LowLevelCallFailed.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-009.assertion: forall _call(target, data): !success AND response.length > 0 => revert(response); !success AND response.length == 0 => revert LowLevelCallFailed()

locations.note: Bubbles up revert reason via assembly at lines 33-37; falls back to LowLevelCallFailed() at line 39
Loops and calls _call per element; propagates reverts directly
